name: Beta / Experimental Features
goal: Safe space for wild experiments that may or may not graduate to main. Things like advanced multi-workflow chains, new model integrations, wild autonomous behaviors, experimental radio modes, etc.
tasks: Experiment with running multiple ComfyUI workflows in parallel or chained pipelines for longer compositions.
Prototype 'vibe coding' mode: agent continuously generates background music tailored to what the user is currently working on.
Test new audio models or custom nodes as they appear in the ComfyUI ecosystem.
Explore more advanced terminal or visual radio interfaces.
Anything too risky or half-baked for main goes here first.
